title: D°Uzi Craft (Java Edition)
description:
D°Uzi Craft is a new experience to enjoy Minecraft!
This resource pack adds a lot of changes and fixes to the game's textures, it also updates the textures of
the game without radically modifying the original art of the game
body:
![duzicraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d539d5b65a6122ae45c45850d714fa1836dd4486.webp)

# Entity Texture Features (EMF) & Entity Model Features (EMF) (or Optifine) ARE REQUIRED!

This is based on [DUziCraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/d-uzi-craft/) by Uzi for Bedrock Edition, and is a port all ResourcePack

### Not yet compatible with Fresh Animations

Images:

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67f2a6eb4e0ec6360a2efdf29680e19f31bba1d5.webp)
![mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/491f67eba25cc744bee552de07e7759606e702bd.webp)

Features:
1. Fix various inconsistencies in blocks such as copper blocks, bricks, ancient debris and more!
2. Update various UI and Hotbar icons that have not been updated for a long time.
3. A big change of textures of blocks, weapons, tools and equipment to look more aesthetic.
4. New C418 music added for discs 11 and 13
5. Update sound in multiple blocks
6. Improved to classic mobs (And new variants from Minecraft Earth, Minecraft Story Mode and Minecraft Dungeons also added)
7. Baby variants for mobs have been added 
8. Variations on some blocks have been added
double slab blocks!

Special Features for Mob Variants:
- 11 new texture variants have been added for Chickens.
- 13 new models variants have been added for Zombies
  
- A new texture variants have been added for Parrots:
"Golden" name for nametags

- 2 new texture variants have been added for Axolotls:
"Cookie" & "Green" names for "nametags"

- 6 new texture variants have been added for Cats:
"winslow", "tuxedo", "gray tabby", "clam", "calico" & "aurora" for nametags

- 14 new texture variants have been added for Cows:
"Moon" for nametags

- 11 new texture variants have been added for Pigs:
"Technoblade" & "Reuben" for nametags

- 7 new texture variants have been added for Creepers.
- 2 new variants have been added for the Enderman.
- A new variant has been added for Goats
- A new variant has been added for Skeleton
- 3 new texture variants have been added for Slimes
- 3 new texture variants have been added for Wolfs
- 12 new texture variants have been added for Zombies
- A new variant has been added for Armadillo
- 6 new texture variants have been added for Snow Golems
- 7 new texture variants have been added for Rabbits
